positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
8. ! [X0] : (~jumps(X0) => can_block(michael,X0)) [input(axiom)]
9. ~can_block(michael,windy) [input(axiom)]
10. ! [X0] : (jumps(X0) => great_shooter(X0)) [input(axiom)]
11. great_shooter(windy) [input(conjecture)]
12. ~great_shooter(windy) [negated conjecture 11]
13. ~great_shooter(windy) [flattening 12]
19. ! [X0] : (can_block(michael,X0) | jumps(X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
20. ! [X0] : (great_shooter(X0) | ~jumps(X0)) [ennf transformation 10]
30. can_block(michael,X0) | jumps(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
31. ~can_block(michael,windy) [cnf transformation 9]
32. ~jumps(X0) | great_shooter(X0) [cnf transformation 20]
33. ~great_shooter(windy) [cnf transformation 13]
34. jumps(windy) [resolution 30,31]
35. great_shooter(windy) [resolution 34,32]
36. $false [forward subsumption resolution 35,33]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
